questions.question: Find the odd one out among the following numbers: 122, 36, 49, 64
questions.explanation: 36, 49, and 64 are perfect squares. 122 is not a perfect square.
questions.trick: Memorize squares up to 30 to instantly spot discrepancies.

questions.question: What will be the Simple Interest on a principal amount of Rs. 1700 at an interest rate of 10% per annum over 2 years?
A train travels at an average speed of 66 km/hr. How much distance will it cover in 4 hours?
questions.trick: Basic multiplication rule: D = S * T.

questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 2, 4, 8, 16, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows a Geometric Progression with a constant multiplier ratio of 2. So, 16 * 2 = 32.
questions.trick: If numbers scale up very quickly, look for multiplication rather than addition.

questions.question: Which is the longest river in the world?
If an article is bought for Rs. 330 and sold at a profit of 10%, what is the selling price?
questions.trick: Calculate 10% of CP, multiply, and add it conceptually.

questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows an Arithmetic Progression with a constant difference of 2. So, 13 + (2) = 15.
questions.trick: Always check the difference between the first and second terms and verify across the series.

questions.question: A can complete a piece of work in 19 days while B can complete the same work in 28 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: Work = 19 * 28 = 532. Rate = 19 + 28 = 47. Time = Work / Rate = 11.32 days.

questions.question: If DOG is coded as EPH, how will PEN be coded in that same language?
questions.explanation: Each letter is shifted forward by exactly 1 positions in the English alphabet.
questions.trick: Note the position gap between the first letter of the word and the first letter of its code.

Who was the first President of India?
